TOKEN.description: Get bot token from @BotFather on TG

STRING_SESSION.description: A Pyrogram V2 String Session for the Music Assistant. Get this from a String Generator bot.

MONGO_DB_URI.description: Required for database connections. Get from cloud.mongodb.com.

OWNER_ID.description: Your user ID as an integer.

SUPPORT_CHAT.description: Your Telegram support group chat username.

START_IMG.description: Telegraph link of the image which will be shown at start command.

EVENT_LOGS.description: Event logs channel to note down important bot level events. ex: '-100123456'

LOG_CHANNEL.description: Channel ID for general logs (usually same as EVENT_LOGS).

TIME_API_KEY.description: Get your API key from https://timezonedb.com/api

ALLOW_EXCL.description: Set this to True if you want ! to be a command prefix along with /.

DEL_CMDS.description: Set this to True if you want to delete command messages.

ENV.description: Setting this to ANYTHING will enable environment variables. Leave it as it is
